text:
Created attachment 241859
Revert Mapnik removal & update to 3.1.0

(In reply to Robert Clausecker from comment #16)

Alright, I think this should now be resolved. Thank you for taking the time to walk me through this.

Install PORTDOCS's `docs/*` into `${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}/docs` in order to resolve `make check-plist` issues.
